patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female (multiple records) with mixed dyslipidemia and hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus, essential hypertension, and anemia (postoperative/unspecified). Major recent labs (07/03/2023) show ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (H), iron 41 ug/dL (L), iron saturation 15% (L), eGFR CKD-EPI 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (L), triglycerides 158 mg/dL (H), LDL 62 mg/dL, and TSH 1.320 mIU/mL. Planned procedure: colonoscopy with biopsy 02/21/2025. Active care teams include primary care, cardiology, endocrinology, and pulmonary/vascular specialists. Social history records include alcohol abstinence and conflicting tobacco use documentation. Functional assessments document difficulty walking; other functional items have conflicting entries. Multiple provider and lab sources are documented; see record for source-level details.
